digest.title: Sharpen the Sword, Skip the Downloads — ‘Onimusha: Way of the Sword’ Is Coming to GeForce NOW
digest.tldr: Onimusha: Way of the Sword is coming to GeForce NOW at launch, with the playable demo available this week.  It’s joined by Denshattack!

digest.title: Our approach to bioresilience
digest.tldr: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.
